hero.label: Krystian Mądry
hero.headline: I connect worlds
hero.wordsSuffix: — built in parallel, systematically, without unnecessary chaos.

how.label: 03 — Process
how.title: How I work
principles: I don't focus on tools — I focus on results. Code, product or physical object is just the form.
I think systematically — I look for dependencies, simplify, close the loop. I'm not interested in perfection, only in delivering things that work.
Most of what I do happens in parallel. From the outside it looks like chaos — on the inside it has structure.

contact.label: 04 — Contact
contact.title: Contact
contact.text: If you see a place where our paths could cross — reach out. No lengthy forms or corporate intros.

engineering.title: Engineering / Project work
engineering.description: I build and deliver complex digital products — from implementation to architecture.

produkty.title: Own products
produkty.description: I create my own applications and products — from idea to first working version.

mentoring.title: Mentoring / Inkubacja.dev
mentoring.description: I help developers level up — through mindset and delivery, not another technology.

events.title: Events / Integration
events.description: I create experiences based on competition and fun — the first RC event is on its way.

design.title: Form / Inspiracja
design.description: I translate ideas into physical forms — minimalist objects and casts.

tools.title: Tools / Production
tools.description: 3D printing, CNC and engraving — a base for creating and testing things.

ops.title: Operations / Rental
ops.description: I'm building a simple business based on equipment and accessibility.
